rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal value and has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §39.202, which governs commissioner-established academic distinction designations based on postsecondary readiness criteria.
quote: The commissioner by rule shall establish an academic distinction designation for districts and campuses for outstanding performance in attainment of postsecondary readiness.
_note: No overlap between the proposed property-tax change and this education accountability provision.
